bounded_retroactivity_theorem.outside_window: not determined in general; AB/BA witness checked
bounded_retroactivity_theorem.query_replay: at most w retained events; no refined state is persisted
bounded_retroactivity_theorem.state: frontier at n-w plus exact last-w events

maximality_boundary: relative to the segment summary, universally zero-replay additions are exactly view-determined obligations; arbitrary retroactive boundaries are not

scope.checkpoint_schedule: fixed exogenous/free schedule; each signal arrives exactly at its boundary
scope.event_system: fixed cell/value alphabets and immutable append-only publications; targeted invalidation is excluded
scope.trust: frontier summaries and retained events are authenticated
